# appRequestedSharing

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the container app requested network sharing.

## Declaration

```swift
let appRequestedSharing: Bool
```

## Discussion

The system sets this flag when your container app calls [doc://com.apple.wifiinfrastructure/documentation/WiFiInfrastructure/WINetworkSharingController/askToShare()].

## Getting event signals

- **newShareableNetworkAvailable**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the system detected available networks your app extension may request from people.
